title: Nature+
description: A mod that adds improvements to nature! This mod includes Oil, Trash, Polluted Water, Trash Dumps, and even Wallmart!
body:
# Nature+

Explore a land filled with majestic new creatures like whales, sharks, and scavenger birds—but beware, they now inhabit a world overwhelmed by the consequences of unchecked growth. From oceans cluttered with trash to sprawling industrial smog over plains, every biome is teeming with "progress."

The mod introduces garbage heaps, polluted skies, and resource-draining mechanics that make survival a true test of ingenuity. This isn’t a problem you can fix—once the wreckage begins, it’s here to stay. Welcome to the new normal.

### Features:
- Polluted Biomes: Every biome evolves with waste, smoke, and debris that spread across the landscape.
- Mobs Gone Mad: Animals and creatures adapt (or don’t) to the ravaged environment, creating chaotic new interactions.
- Unstoppable Decay: Trash piles and smog levels rise without any way to reverse the damage—survival is about adaptation, not restoration.
- Twisted Resources: Use trash and waste to craft “unique” tools, blocks, and items, but at a cost.

<details> <summary>Planned Updates</summary>
Pollution spreading to all biomes, including forests, deserts, and caves.
Introduction of scavenger birds that thrive on the trash and compete with players for resources.
Expanding "progress" mechanics to introduce automated factories and urban sprawl that further deteriorate the environment.
Mutated mobs that thrive in the wrecked world, with new behaviors and dangers.
Dynamic biome transformations as pollution overtakes and reshapes the world around you.
</details>

The world’s a mess, and you’re just living in it. Can you survive the wreckage—or will you become part of it?
